response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong engineer with 15+ years of full-stack experience, production-scale systems expertise (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby), and demonstrated technical leadership. However, the Principal role requires deep specialization in growth/experimentation systems—including experimentation platforms, metrics infrastructure, statistical analysis, and rollout management—none of which appear in the resume. While his engineering fundamentals could enable him to build this expertise, the gap between general excellence and Principal-level impact in this specialized domain is too large.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded systems with strong emphasis on testing, TDD, and software craftsmanship
Proven expertise building high-performance, low-latency systems at scale (millions of HTTP requests/second, async I/O, microservices infrastructure at Dunnhumby)
Staff-level technical leadership with mentoring experience; current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, showing adaptability to emerging platforms
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or measurement infrastructure used across multiple teams
Absence of metrics, telemetry, statistical analysis, or experimental-design expertise—core to the role's focus on data aptitude and bias detection
Limited evidence of leading large cross-functional growth/measurement initiatives or translating product/business goals into systematic experimentation frameworks
